basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bibinagar Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 48 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bibinagar (AIIMS Bibinagar)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bibinagar (AIIMS Bibinagar) Faculty Posts (Group-A) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Bibinagar. A total of 48 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Bibinagar Faculty Posts (Group-A) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 58 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years; OBC: 3 years; PwBD: 10 years; Govt Servants: 5 years; Ex-Servicemen: as per GoI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS or equivalent, MD/MS or equivalent, DM/MCh or equivalent, Master's degree (Non-medical), PhD (Non-medical)
qualification.details: Professor: Medical: MBBS + PG qualification (MD/MS/DM/MCh) + 11-14 years teaching/research experience; Non-medical: Master's + PhD + 14 years experience Additional Professor: Medical: MBBS + PG qualification (MD/MS/DM/MCh) + 7-10 years teaching/research experience; Non-medical: Master's + PhD + 10 years experience Associate Professor: Medical: MBBS + PG qualification (MD/MS/DM/MCh) + 3-6 years teaching/research experience; Non-medical: Master's + PhD + 6 years experience Assistant Professor: Medical: MBBS + PG qualification (MD/MS/DM/MCh) + 0-3 years teaching experience (depending on super-speciality course duration); Non-medical: Master's + PhD + 6 years experience

salary_details.details: Professor: Level 14-A (Minimum Pay Rs.1,68,900/-) + NPA Additional Professor: Level 13-A2+ (Minimum Pay Rs.1,48,200/-) + NPA Associate Professor: Level 13-A1+ (Minimum Pay Rs.1,38,300/-) + NPA Assistant Professor: Level 12 (Minimum Pay Rs.1,01,500/-) + NPA; after 3 years Level 13 (Rs.1,23,100/-)

selection_process: Screening Test (if applicable) Interview Document Verification Merit List
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bibinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bibinagar Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.all_india_institute_of_medical_sciences_: MBBS or equivalent, MD/MS or equivalent, DM/MCh or equivalent, Master's degree (Non-medical), PhD (Non-medical)

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bibinagar Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the AIIMS Bibinagar Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download AIIMS Bibinagar Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bibinagar Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Professor: Medical: MBBS + PG qualification (MD/MS/DM/MCh) + 11-14 years teaching/research experience; Non-medical: Master's + PhD + 14 years experience Additional Professor: Medical: MBBS + PG qualification (MD/MS/DM/MCh) + 7-10 years teaching/research experience; Non-medical: Master's + PhD + 10 years experience Associate Professor: Medical: MBBS + PG qualification (MD/MS/DM/MCh) + 3-6 years teaching/research experience; Non-medical: Master's + PhD + 6 years experience Assistant Professor: Medical: MBBS + PG qualification (MD/MS/DM/MCh) + 0-3 years teaching experience (depending on super-speciality course duration); Non-medical: Master's + PhD + 6 years experience

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bibinagar Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 58 years for all posts. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years; OBC: 3 years; PwBD: 10 years; Govt Servants: 5 years; Ex-Servicemen: as per GoI rules.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bibinagar Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Professor: Level 14-A (Minimum Pay Rs.1,68,900/-) + NPA Additional Professor: Level 13-A2+ (Minimum Pay Rs.1,48,200/-) + NPA Associate Professor: Level 13-A1+ (Minimum Pay Rs.1,38,300/-) + NPA Assistant Professor: Level 12 (Minimum Pay Rs.1,01,500/-) + NPA; after 3 years Level 13 (Rs.1,23,100/-)

rows.event: Last Date for Hard Copy Receipt

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Bibinagar Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Screening Test (if applicable) Interview Document Verification Merit List

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Bibinagar to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Bibinagar Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the AIIMS Bibinagar Faculty Posts is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Faculty Posts at AIIMS Bibinagar?
faq.answer: There are a total of 48 vacancies for Faculty Posts (Group-A) at AIIMS Bibinagar.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: For the Assistant Professor post, the minimum qualification is MBBS + PG qualification (MD/MS/DM/MCh) + 0-3 years teaching experience for medical candidates, and Master's + PhD + 6 years experience for non-medical candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 3,540/- (including 18% GST).

faq.question: Q5. Are there any application fees for SC/ST and Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees for SC/ST and Women candidates.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Faculty Posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Faculty Posts is 58 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Screening Test (if applicable), Interview, Document Verification, and Merit List preparation.

faq.question: Q8. What is the starting salary for an Assistant Professor?
faq.answer: The starting salary for an Assistant Professor is Level 12, with a minimum pay of Rs. 1,01,500/- plus NPA.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article by clicking on the provided link.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of AIIMS Bibinagar?
faq.answer: The official website of AIIMS Bibinagar is https://aiimsbibinagar.edu.in.
